title: Dj's Magic Blocks
description: Turn any head into a block with ease
body:
Magic Blocks is a Datapack that allows you to create blocks from custom player heads and is survival friendly as it comes loaded with 188 hand picked player heads all from The Heads Database from different sections being Misc, Alphabet, Animals, Blocks, Decoration, Food and Plants all for you to choose from. no resource pack required

-To get started you will need the Block Trader which can be summoned by typing in /function blocks:block_trader

-Next is the Magic Block Tool Book which you can get by typing /function blocks:magic_block_book

and that should be all, everything else will be self-explanatory within the book as I really tried to make it very easy to use. Hope you enjoy.

-Check out my Planet Minecraft for more similar content [https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/djmaster180/](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/djmaster180/)
